'''√k-n-g''' ('''kakanag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lasertypeset|lasertypeset]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lasertypeset|lasertypeset]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √k-n-g
|-
! Lemma
| kakanag
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thikanag || jikanag || shikanag || kikanag
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthukanag || jujukanag || shushukanag || kukukanag
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thukanag || jukanag || shukanag || kukanag
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thukanag || jukanag || shukanag || kukanag
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thekanag || jekanag || shekanag || kekanag
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothokanag || jojokanag || shoshokanag || kokokanag
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thokanag || jokanag || shokanag || kokanag
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thokanag || jokanag || shokanag || kokanag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kanag || kanag || kanag || kanag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kanag || kanag || kanag || kanag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kanag || kanag || kanag || kanag
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kanag || kanag || kanag || kanag
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thækanag || jækanag || shækanag || kækanag
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathakanag || jajakanag || shashakanag || kakakanag
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thakanag || jakanag || shakanag || kakanag
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thakanag || jakanag || shakanag || kakanag
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shakanag
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshakanag
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishakanag
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shakanagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshakanagnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishakanagnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shakanagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshakanagnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishakanagshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shakanagro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshakanagnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishakanagro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shakanagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshakanagnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishakanagmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shakanagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshakanagnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishakanagsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shakanagng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshakanagnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishakanagng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shakanagya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshakanagnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishakanagya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shakanagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshakanagnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishakanagyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shakanagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshakanagnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishakanagnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shakanagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakanagnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakanagnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shakanagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshakanagnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakanagnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shakanagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshakanagnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishakanagshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shakanagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakanagnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakanagshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shakanagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshakanagnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakanagshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shakanagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshakanagnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishakanagronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shakanagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshakanagnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishakanagroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shakanagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshakanagnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakanagromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shakanagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshakanagnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishakanagmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shakanagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshakanagnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishakanagmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shakanagmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakanagnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakanagmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
